action.reasoning: Observation: iter8 trained ResCNN 25 epochs, best mean_r2 = -7.4e7 (still extremely negative), r2_t = 0.46, r2_q = -1.58e8, r2_rad_prec = 0.92. Train loss 0.36, val loss 0.47. Gap is small but humidity R² dominated by low‐variance dimensions remains terrible. Analysis: 1D CNN lacks multi‐scale vertical feature extraction and does not leverage scalar (surface/solar) features effectively at each level. A 1D U‐Net with scalar conditioning broadcasted to every vertical level can better capture the multi‐scale atmospheric physics and improve predictions for humidity tendencies. The remaining time budget is ~28 minutes, so we must quickly test a better architecture. Decision: implement a 1D U‐Net with encoder‐decoder skip connections and scalar embedding concatenated as input channels. Train for only 3 epochs to validate architecture within time limit, then submit eval to measure improvement in mean_r2 and especially r2_q.
